title: papaver rhoeas var. himerense
intro: Papaver rhoeas var. himerense, also known as the poppy of the Orient, is a variety of the common poppy plant (Papaver rhoeas) native to Asia and Europe. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for centuries due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and analgesic effects. The health benefits of Papaver rhoeas var. himerense include relief from pain, reduced inflammation, and improved sleep quality. The plant can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or powder, and is often used in herbal medicine to treat a range of conditions, including insomnia, anxiety, and minor aches and pains.
